name: Cajun Turnovers (Festival)
recipeIngredient: 4.3 ounce package Long-grain wild rice mix
recipeInstructions:
1. FILLING: In a large skillet, sauté onion, green bell pepper, and celery in butter until tender. Add mushrooms. Stir in rice, water, Worcestershire sauce, hot sauce, garlic powder, and red pepper. Bring to a boil, cover tightly, and simmer for 10 minutes.
2. DOUGH: Preheat oven to 375 degrees F. Separate crescent rolls into rectangles. Seal the seams by pressing the dough together. Place rice mixture (chilled for easier shaping) in the center of each rectangle. Fold dough over and press with a fork to seal edges. Brush tops with beaten egg.
3. Bake turnovers on a lightly greased cookie sheet for 12-13 minutes.
